name: Data Scientist Profile
description: Analytical professional obsessed with turning data into insights

profile.interests: machine learning, data visualization, statistical analysis, business intelligence, automation
profile.values: rigor, evidence-based decision making, continuous improvement, intellectual challenge
profile.workingStyle: independent research with periodic team collaboration
profile.hardSkills: Python, R, SQL, statistical analysis, machine learning, Tableau/Power BI
profile.softSkills: communication, translating technical concepts, storytelling with data, collaboration
profile.riskTolerance: low-medium — prefers experimental approach within guardrails
profile.education: Master's in Statistics, Computer Science, or related field
profile.purposePriorities: uncovering insights that drive decisions, building predictive models, enabling data-driven culture
profile.burnoutConcerns: politics overriding data insights, repetitive analysis, unclear business context
